hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The council’s signals are weak and volatile. BTC shows a marginal long edge but its composite is near zero and volatility is high; the other three assets have negative composites and alphas, elevated beta, and substantial volatility, making their signals fragile. Data‑quality concerns (zero prices) further warrant a defensive stance. Adjust convictions modestly downward for the alts and a slight uplift for BTC, while keeping overall exposure low.
